briefdescription.para: Long name for species used for NetCDF attribute "long_name".
Short name for species.
Description of species.
If true, species is a gas and not an aerosol.
If true, species is aerosol and not a gas.
If true, species is a tracer and not an aerosol or gas that undergoes chemistry or photolysis.
If true, species is advected.
If true, species undergoes dry deposition.
if true, species undergoes wet deposition
If true, species undergoes photolysis.
If true, species is a GOCART aerosol species.
If true, species is dust.
If true, species is sea salt.
Gaseous molecular weight [g/mol].
Particle density [kg/m³].
Mean molecular diameter [m].
Lower radius [m].
Upper radius [m].
Kinematic viscosity [m²/s].
reactivity factor for oxidation of biological substances
Henry’s law constant.
fix dry deposition velocity (cm/s) over ice and snow for certain aerosol species
minimum dry deposition velocity (cm/s) over snow and ice
minimum dry deposition velocity (cm/s) over land
Henry’s law solubility constant ( M / atm)
Henry’s law volatility constant (K)
Henry’s Law pH correction factor (seems zeros for all species now)
retention efficiency of species in the liquid cloud condensate as it is converted to precipitation
whether the ice-to-gas ratio can be computed for this species by co-condensation
conversion factor for computing the ice-to-gas ratio by co-condensation when wd_LiqAndGas = .true.
temperature-dependent (T < 237k; 237 <= T < 258k; T >= 258k) scale factor for the fraction of rainout.
Mie data name associated with this species for settling velocity calculation.
Background concentration [v/v].
Species index in species array.
Dry deposition index in drydep array.
Photolysis index in photolysis array.
GOCART aerosol index in gocart_aero array.
Species concentration [v/v] or [kg/kg].
Validation status.
Initialize a species with enhanced validation.

detaileddescription.para: This subroutine initializes a SpeciesType object with comprehensive error checking and validation.

parameterdescription.para: Short name identifier for the species

briefdescription.para: Validate species properties.

detaileddescription.para: This function validates all species properties for consistency and physical validity.

briefdescription.para: Cleanup species resources.

detaileddescription.para: This subroutine deallocates all allocated arrays and resets the species.

briefdescription.para: Set species concentration with bounds checking.

detaileddescription.para: This subroutine sets the species concentration with validation.

briefdescription.para: Get species concentration at grid point.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the concentration of the species at a specified grid point with bounds checking.

briefdescription.para: Copy species properties from another species.

detaileddescription.para: This subroutine creates a deep copy of another species object.

parameterdescription.para: The source species object to copy from

briefdescription.para: Print species information.

detaileddescription.para: This subroutine prints detailed information about the species to standard output for debugging and diagnostics.

briefdescription.para: Derived type for chemical species.

detaileddescription.para: This type contains all properties and data for a chemical species in the CATChem atmospheric chemistry model, including physical properties, classification flags, and concentration data.

parameterdescription.para: Long descriptive name for species (NetCDF attribute)
Logical flag: true if species is gaseous
Logical flag: true if species is an aerosol
Logical flag: true if species is a passive tracer
Logical flag: true if species undergoes advection
Logical flag: true if species undergoes dry deposition
Logical flag: true if species undergoes photolysis
Logical flag: true if species is a GOCART aerosol
Logical flag: true if species is dust
Logical flag: true if species is sea salt
